backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor placeholder with no logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short descriptions of all frontend files for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and utility setup defining OKLCH color variables and global styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with metadata, favicon, and root element loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with root layout and routes for all pages.
frontend/src/components/site/ContactForm: Client-side contact form that opens a mailto link with prefilled user input.
frontend/src/components/site/HighlightsS: Grid of four highlight cards describing key business services with icons.
frontend/src/components/site/Section.tsx: Reusable section container with variants and optional header component.
Global app layout with header, navigation, mobile menu, footer, and outlet for page content.
frontend/src/components/trillboards/Earn: Displays an earnings calculator UI with selectable business types and static estimated earnings info.
frontend/src/components/trillboards/HowI: Renders a three‑step card layout explaining how the Trillboards app works.
frontend/src/components/trillboards/Proo: Shows metrics cards highlighting screens, payouts, and impressions served.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Updates the document title and description meta tag when page metadata changes.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, plus global typography rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders an About page with company background, expertise, approach, and Trillboards partnership info.
frontend/src/pages/CareersPage.tsx: Displays a Careers page detailing an Operations Executive role, responsibilities, and job context.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact page with address, phone, email, and business hours along with page metadata setup.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Implements the homepage hero, highlights, and CTA sections with navigation and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Defines grouped service categories, onboarding steps, and security controls, then renders the Services page layout with metadata.
frontend/src/pages/TrillboardsPage.tsx: Builds the Trillboards marketing page including benefits, FAQs, earnings/calculator components, and metadata.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, container queries, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, requirements, architecture notes, image tasks, and feature definitions.
